---
name: Pull Request

---

## Description
Please include a summary of the changes and the related issue. Please also include relevant motivation and context. List any dependencies that are required for this change.

Fixes #(issue number)

## Type of Change
- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] 🎨 UI/UX improvements
- [ ] 📝 Documentation updates
- [ ] ♻️ Refactoring (improving code structure without changing functionality)
- [ ] ⚡ Performance improvements
- [ ] ✅ Tests (adding or updating tests)

## Testing
Please describe the tests you ran to verify your changes:

- [ ] Unit tests pass locally
- [ ] Integration tests pass locally
- [ ] Manual testing completed on Desktop (Chrome/Firefox/Safari)
- [ ] Manual testing completed on Mobile
- [ ] 3D rendering works correctly
- [ ] API functionality tested
- [ ] All lint checks pass

Provide instructions to test the changes:
```
Add testing steps here
```

## Screenshots (if applicable)

Please add screenshots or GIFs to help illustrate your changes if relevant:

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the style guidelines of this project
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works
- [ ] New and existing unit tests pass locally with my changes
- [ ] Any dependent changes have been merged and published in downstream modules

## Additional Notes

Add any other notes, context, or considerations for the reviewer here:

## Breaking Changes

If this PR introduces breaking changes, please describe them here:

---

## Reviewer Guidelines

Please ensure:

- [ ] Code is readable and follows project conventions
- [ ] Changes align with the issue or feature request
- [ ] Tests are adequate and pass
- [ ] Documentation is updated if needed
- [ ] No sensitive data (API keys, secrets) are committed

---

**Thank you for contributing!** 🙏
